title: Drawer Location
description: Type definition for the location where a drawer appears on the screen. Supports RTL-aware positioning.

props.name: AXDrawerLocation
props.description: Union type that defines the location where a drawer appears. 'start' and 'end' are RTL-aware (start is left in LTR, right in RTL; end is right in LTR, left in RTL). 'top' and 'bottom' are always at the top and bottom respectively.
